CONTENT.Career statistics: Scores and results list Slovenia's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Bohar goal.
CONTENT.International career: Bohar made his debut for Slovenia in a November 2014 friendly match against Colombia, coming on as a 59th-minute substitute for Dejan Lazarević, and earned a total of 16 caps, scoring 1 goal. His final international was a September 2021 World Cup qualification match against Malta.

SUMMARY: Damjan Bohar (born 18 October 1991) is a Slovenian professional footballer who plays as a left winger. Besides Slovenia, he has played in Poland and Croatia.
